{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Sales Representative",
  "description": "Linkco Gadgets is a growing independent phones accessories distributors&rsquo; company with its head office located at NO 9 Global Update Plaza, Fancy Lane Alaba International Market, Lagos Nigeria. Our core area of specialization; Importation, distribution and retails of Linkco products (phones accessories).

On the basis of our vast wealth of Business competence and integrated communication relationship, coupled with our in-depth knowledge of the local business environment and economic conditions in Nigeria, Linkco Gadgets is in a position to assure our customers of quality service, delivery at all times.

Linkco Gadgets has growing competence of over 21 human work-force and material resources necessary to provide reliable and efficient services required for our Sub-dealers, Retailers etc.

Expansion: Based on our target decision of the company expansion, we have established business branches across some region of the country: Abia State (Aba), Anambra State (Onitsha), Kano State (Kano), Lagos State, and still expanding.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Sales Representative

Job Location: Beruit Road, Kano
Employment Type: Full-time

Summary


	We&#39;re seeking an experienced Sales Representativeto oversee the smooth operation of our kanobranches.
	The successful candidate will be responsible for ensuring the branch is runing efficiently,and in line with company policies and procedures.


Key Responsibilities


	Oversee the operations of the branch, ensuring alignment with company goals and objectives
	Monitor branch performance, identifying areas for improvement and implementing corrective actions
	Develop and implement operational strategies to enhance efficiency, productivity, and customer satisfaction
	Ensure compliance with company policies, procedures, and regulatory requirements
	Provide guidance and supportive information to th management for decision making
	Analyze branch performance data, customer behavour, market reactionand make recommendations for improvement
	Foster a culture of excellence, innovation, and teamwork in the branch.


Qualifications


	Interested candidates should possess an NCE / HND / Bachelor`s Degree with 2 - 4 years of experience.


Salary
N130,000 - N150,000 monthly.

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should forward their CV to: cdonhrd@gmail.com using &quot;Kano SR&quot; as the subject of the mail.",

Sales Representative Job at Linkco Gadgets




        
    

        
        Linkco Gadgets is a growing independent phones accessories distributors’ company with its head office located at NO 9 Global Update Plaza, Fancy Lane Alaba International Market, Lagos Nigeria. Our core area of specialization; Importation, distribution and retails of Linkco products (phones accessories).
     

            
    



On the basis of our vast wealth of Business competence and integrated communication relationship, coupled with our in-depth knowledge of the local business environment and economic conditions in Nigeria, Linkco Gadgets is in a position to assure our customers of quality service, delivery at all times.

Linkco Gadgets has growing competence of over 21 human work-force and material resources necessary to provide reliable and efficient services required for our Sub-dealers, Retailers etc.

Expansion: Based on our target decision of the company expansion, we have established business branches across some region of the country: Abia State (Aba), Anambra State (Onitsha), Kano State (Kano), Lagos State, and still expanding.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Sales Representative

Job Location: Beruit Road, Kano
Employment Type: Full-time

Summary


	We're seeking an experienced Sales Representativeto oversee the smooth operation of our kanobranches.
	The successful candidate will be responsible for ensuring the branch is runing efficiently,and in line with company policies and procedures.


Key Responsibilities


	Oversee the operations of the branch, ensuring alignment with company goals and objectives
	Monitor branch performance, identifying areas for improvement and implementing corrective actions
	Develop and implement operational strategies to enhance efficiency, productivity, and customer satisfaction
	Ensure compliance with company policies, procedures, and regulatory requirements
	Provide guidance and supportive information to th management for decision making
	Analyze branch performance data, customer behavour, market reactionand make recommendations for improvement
	Foster a culture of excellence, innovation, and teamwork in the branch.


Qualifications


	Interested candidates should possess an NCE / HND / Bachelor`s Degree with 2 - 4 years of experience.


Salary
N130,000 - N150,000 monthly.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should forward their CV to: [email protected] using "Kano SR" as the subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Inventory Controller",
  "description": "Timekeepers International Limited (Timekeepers) is a limited liability company and was registered in Nigeria in the year 2009. Born with many years of experience, it was set up with the aim of importing watches, jewelry and accessories from some of the world&rsquo;s leading brands for the purpose of distribution and retailing primarily in Nigeria and then the West African Sub-region.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Inventory Controller

Job Location: Ikeja, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	The Inventory Controller maintains accurate inventory records, monitors stock movement, conducts stock counts, investigates discrepancies, and ensures efficient storage, tracking, and distribution of inventory across the warehouse and retail stores minimizing losses and improving accuracy and product availability.


Key Responsibilities


	Monitor stock levels and movement across locations.
	Maintain accurate, up-to-date records.
	Reconcile physical stock with system data.
	Track slow-moving and obsolete items.
	Verify and document incoming shipments.
	Coordinate and document stock transfers between warehouse and stores.
	Confirm receipt at destination.
	Plan and run cycle counts and full audits (daily to annual).
	Investigate variances, prepare reports, and recommend corrective action.
	Ensure proper labeling, organization, and storage.
	Apply FIFO (First in, First Out) stock rotation.
	Maintain a secure, orderly warehouse.
	Produce regular reports on stock movement, variances, ageing, slow/dead stock, and low-stock alerts to support management decisions.
	Monitor shrinkage, investigate losses / damages, and recommend control improvements.
	Support internal and external audits.
	Keep ERP/inventory software records accurate and current.
	Report system issues affecting data integrity.
	Work with Purchasing, Warehouse, Retail, Finance, and Operations.
	Support store-level inventory needs and improvement initiatives.
	Follow inventory, safety, and confidentiality policies.


Requirements


	Bachelor&#39;s Degree / HND in Supply Chain, Logistics, Business Administration, Accounting, or a related field.
	2&ndash;4 years of experience in inventory control, warehouse operations, or stock management (retail / FMCG / fashion a plus).
	Strong Excel skills; experience with ERP systems (Odoo, SAP, Oracle, Dynamics).
	Strong analytical, numerical, and reconciliation skills.


Competencies:


	Detail-oriented, organized, analytical, trustworthy, deadline-driven, good communicator, works well independently and in teams.


Working Conditions:


	Regular movement between warehouse / stores, occasional lifting, periodic travel for audits, extended hours during stock counts / year-end.


Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: timelessrecruitment@gmail.com using the Job Position and Location (e.g., Inventory Controller - IKEJA) as the subject of the mail.",

  "validThrough": "2026-07-21",

  },

Inventory Controller Job at Timekeepers International Limited




        
    

        
        Timekeepers International Limited (Timekeepers) is a limited liability company and was registered in Nigeria in the year 2009. Born with many years of experience, it was set up with the aim of importing watches, jewelry and accessories from some of the world’s leading brands for the purpose of distribution and retailing primarily in Nigeria and then the West African Sub-region.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Inventory Controller

Job Location: Ikeja, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary
     

            
    




	The Inventory Controller maintains accurate inventory records, monitors stock movement, conducts stock counts, investigates discrepancies, and ensures efficient storage, tracking, and distribution of inventory across the warehouse and retail stores minimizing losses and improving accuracy and product availability.


Key Responsibilities


	Monitor stock levels and movement across locations.
	Maintain accurate, up-to-date records.
	Reconcile physical stock with system data.
	Track slow-moving and obsolete items.
	Verify and document incoming shipments.
	Coordinate and document stock transfers between warehouse and stores.
	Confirm receipt at destination.
	Plan and run cycle counts and full audits (daily to annual).
	Investigate variances, prepare reports, and recommend corrective action.
	Ensure proper labeling, organization, and storage.
	Apply FIFO (First in, First Out) stock rotation.
	Maintain a secure, orderly warehouse.
	Produce regular reports on stock movement, variances, ageing, slow/dead stock, and low-stock alerts to support management decisions.
	Monitor shrinkage, investigate losses / damages, and recommend control improvements.
	Support internal and external audits.
	Keep ERP/inventory software records accurate and current.
	Report system issues affecting data integrity.
	Work with Purchasing, Warehouse, Retail, Finance, and Operations.
	Support store-level inventory needs and improvement initiatives.
	Follow inventory, safety, and confidentiality policies.


Requirements


	Bachelor's Degree / HND in Supply Chain, Logistics, Business Administration, Accounting, or a related field.
	2–4 years of experience in inventory control, warehouse operations, or stock management (retail / FMCG / fashion a plus).
	Strong Excel skills; experience with ERP systems (Odoo, SAP, Oracle, Dynamics).
	Strong analytical, numerical, and reconciliation skills.


Competencies:


	Detail-oriented, organized, analytical, trustworthy, deadline-driven, good communicator, works well independently and in teams.


Working Conditions:


	Regular movement between warehouse / stores, occasional lifting, periodic travel for audits, extended hours during stock counts / year-end.


Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position and Location (e.g., Inventory Controller - IKEJA) as the subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply

Female Sales Representative Job at Leap Microfinance




        
    

        
        At Leap Microfinance, we empower individuals and businesses with smart financial solutions that drive sustainable growth. Numerous financial service include but not limited to; Personal Loans, Business Loans, Salary Advance, Assets Acquisition and Thrift.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Female Sales Representative
Job Location: Kubwa, Mararaba, Nyaya, Zone 5 - Abuja (FCT)
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Description / Responsibilities
     

            
    




	Engaging Prospects: Proactively reaching out to individuals and businesses to present deposit and loan products tailored to their needs.
	Customer Relationship Management: Cultivating and maintaining strong relationships with new and existing clients to increase business share.
	Due Diligence: Conducting thorough evaluations of potential customers before onboarding and at scheduled intervals to ensure compliance and risk mitigation.
	Collaborative Service Delivery: Working closely with colleagues across departments to provide seamless, high-quality service to customers.
	Marketing Activities: Contributing to daily marketing activities and advertising the bank’s products.
	Loan Portfolio Monitoring: Proper follow-up on existing customers and daily monitoring of the loan portfolio.
	Documentation Review: Reviewing client documentation to ensure compliance with internal policies and regulatory requirements.
	Sales Targets: Ensuring assigned sales targets and budgets are met and participating in sales performance review meetings.


Requirements


	Candidates should possess a Bachelor's Degree with 3 - 4 years of work experience.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using "Sales Representative" as the subject of the email.

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Digital Marketer",
  "description": "Peridot Forte - Our client in the Information Technology Industry is recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Digital Marketer

Job Location: Remote
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Description


	Our client in the Information Technology industry is seeking a creative, analytical, and results-driven Digital Marketer to develop and execute innovative digital marketing strategies that enhance brand visibility, attract and engage target audiences, generate qualified leads, and drive business growth across multiple digital channels.
	The Digital Marketer is responsible for planning, implementing, and optimizing digital marketing initiatives that strengthen the organization&#39;s online presence and support business objectives.
	The role involves creating compelling content, managing multi-channel campaigns, analyzing marketing performance, and leveraging digital tools and insights to improve customer engagement, lead generation, and overall marketing effectiveness.


Job Responsibilities


	Develop and execute integrated digital marketing campaigns across SEO, SEM, GEO, email marketing, advertising, and social media.
	Manage the company&#39;s digital presence across relevant social media platforms.
	Create, edit, and distribute engaging marketing content, including blog articles, social media posts, email campaigns, and digital advertisements.
	Repurpose long-form content into multiple formats, including LinkedIn posts, X (Twitter) threads, Instagram carousels, short-form videos, email newsletters, and other platform-specific content.
	Develop and distribute content across relevant digital platforms and online communities, including Reddit, Quora, Indie Hackers, and other industry forums, to maximize reach, increase brand awareness, foster audience engagement, and establish thought leadership.
	Monitor, analyze, and report on campaign performance using digital analytics tools.
	Optimize website content, landing pages, and customer journeys to improve lead generation and conversion rates.
	Conduct keyword research and implement SEO best practices to improve search visibility.
	Plan, execute, and optimize paid advertising campaigns.
	Utilize AI-powered tools to support content creation, campaign planning, research, and overall marketing productivity while maintaining the company&#39;s brand voice.
	Collaborate with cross-functional teams to ensure consistent messaging and alignment with business objectives.


Requirements


	First Degree in any discipline with 1-2 years of experience in digital marketing, growth marketing, or a related role.
	Proven experience in planning, executing, and optimizing digital marketing campaigns across multiple channels.
	Strong understanding of SEO, SEM, GEO, PPC advertising, email marketing, social media marketing, and content marketing.
	Proficiency in digital marketing and analytics tools such as Google Analytics, Google Search Console, Microsoft Clarity, and Google Ads.
	Excellent copywriting, content creation, and storytelling skills with the ability to communicate complex ideas clearly.
	Experience using AI-powered tools (e.g., ChatGPT, Gemini, Claude) to improve marketing productivity and content development.
	Strong analytical skills with the ability to interpret marketing data and make data-driven decisions.
	Excellent written and verbal communication, organizational, and project management skills.
	Relevant professional certifications in Digital Marketing are an added advantage.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified&nbsp; candidates should send their CVs to: peridotforte@gmail.com using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

  "validThrough": "2026-07-25",
  "employmentType": "Full-Time",

    "@type": "Organization",

  },

Digital Marketer Job at Peridot Forte Solutions Consulting




        
    

        
        Peridot Forte - Our client in the Information Technology Industry is recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Digital Marketer

Job Location: Remote
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Description
     

            
    




	Our client in the Information Technology industry is seeking a creative, analytical, and results-driven Digital Marketer to develop and execute innovative digital marketing strategies that enhance brand visibility, attract and engage target audiences, generate qualified leads, and drive business growth across multiple digital channels.
	The Digital Marketer is responsible for planning, implementing, and optimizing digital marketing initiatives that strengthen the organization's online presence and support business objectives.
	The role involves creating compelling content, managing multi-channel campaigns, analyzing marketing performance, and leveraging digital tools and insights to improve customer engagement, lead generation, and overall marketing effectiveness.


Job Responsibilities


	Develop and execute integrated digital marketing campaigns across SEO, SEM, GEO, email marketing, advertising, and social media.
	Manage the company's digital presence across relevant social media platforms.
	Create, edit, and distribute engaging marketing content, including blog articles, social media posts, email campaigns, and digital advertisements.
	Repurpose long-form content into multiple formats, including LinkedIn posts, X (Twitter) threads, Instagram carousels, short-form videos, email newsletters, and other platform-specific content.
	Develop and distribute content across relevant digital platforms and online communities, including Reddit, Quora, Indie Hackers, and other industry forums, to maximize reach, increase brand awareness, foster audience engagement, and establish thought leadership.
	Monitor, analyze, and report on campaign performance using digital analytics tools.
	Optimize website content, landing pages, and customer journeys to improve lead generation and conversion rates.
	Conduct keyword research and implement SEO best practices to improve search visibility.
	Plan, execute, and optimize paid advertising campaigns.
	Utilize AI-powered tools to support content creation, campaign planning, research, and overall marketing productivity while maintaining the company's brand voice.
	Collaborate with cross-functional teams to ensure consistent messaging and alignment with business objectives.


Requirements


	First Degree in any discipline with 1-2 years of experience in digital marketing, growth marketing, or a related role.
	Proven experience in planning, executing, and optimizing digital marketing campaigns across multiple channels.
	Strong understanding of SEO, SEM, GEO, PPC advertising, email marketing, social media marketing, and content marketing.
	Proficiency in digital marketing and analytics tools such as Google Analytics, Google Search Console, Microsoft Clarity, and Google Ads.
	Excellent copywriting, content creation, and storytelling skills with the ability to communicate complex ideas clearly.
	Experience using AI-powered tools (e.g., ChatGPT, Gemini, Claude) to improve marketing productivity and content development.
	Strong analytical skills with the ability to interpret marketing data and make data-driven decisions.
	Excellent written and verbal communication, organizational, and project management skills.
	Relevant professional certifications in Digital Marketing are an added advantage.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified  candidates should send their CVs to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Chief Marketing Officer",
  "description": "Prixair Group is a dynamic and diversified company committed to excellence across various industries including hospitality, beauty, events, logistics, media, and lifestyle services. With a passion for delivering world-class experiences, Prixair has built a strong reputation for quality, professionalism, and innovation.

Driven by a customer-first philosophy, Prixair Group continuously sets industry benchmarks through exceptional service delivery, operational efficiency, and a dedicated workforce. Our diverse portfolio of brands works seamlessly together to provide top-tier solutions that meet the evolving needs of individuals and organizations.

From premium spa treatments to event planning, media production, transport, and hotel management, Prixair Group is dedicated to creating value and inspiring trust across every touchpoint.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Chief Marketing Officer
Job Location: Abuja
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	The Chief Marketing Officer (CMO) is responsible for leading the strategic direction, planning, and execution of marketing, branding, communications, customer engagement, and business growth initiatives across the Group of Companies.
	The role oversees the marketing functions of all subsidiaries, ensuring brand consistency while developing tailored strategies that drive revenue, market share, and customer loyalty for each business unit.
	The CMO will collaborate closely with executive leadership, business unit heads, sales teams, and external partners to position the Group as an industry leader and maximize commercial opportunities across diverse sectors.


Key Responsibilities
Strategic Leadership:


	Develop and implement the Group&#39;s integrated marketing strategy aligned with corporate objectives.
	Lead marketing initiatives across all subsidiaries while maintaining each company&#39;s unique brand identity.
	Identify new market opportunities, customer segments, and revenue streams.
	Provide strategic marketing advice to the Group CEO and Executive Leadership Team.
	Build long-term marketing plans that support sustainable business growth.


Brand Management:


	Develop and maintain a strong corporate brand for the Group.
	Ensure consistent branding standards across all subsidiaries.
	Lead brand positioning, reputation management, and corporate identity initiatives.
	Oversee rebranding and brand expansion projects where necessary.


Marketing &amp; Communications:


	Direct integrated marketing campaigns across digital, traditional, and experiential channels.
	Develop communication strategies for internal and external stakeholders.
	Manage corporate communications, media relations, and public relations.
	Oversee content strategy, advertising, social media, and digital marketing activities.


Business Growth:


	Partner with business unit leaders to develop market-specific growth strategies.
	Support sales teams through lead generation and customer acquisition initiatives.
	Identify strategic partnerships, sponsorships, and business development opportunities.
	Drive customer retention and loyalty programs across the Group.


Market Intelligence:


	Conduct market research and competitive analysis.
	Monitor industry trends, consumer behavior, and emerging technologies.
	Use market insights to guide product development and commercial decisions.
	Present strategic recommendations based on data and analytics.


Digital Marketing &amp; Innovation:


	Lead the Group&#39;s digital transformation in marketing.
	Optimize digital platforms, websites, SEO, SEM, CRM, and marketing automation.
	Drive innovation through AI, analytics, and emerging marketing technologies.
	Improve customer experience across all digital touchpoints.


Budget &amp; Performance Management:


	Develop and manage the Group marketing budget.
	Monitor marketing ROI and campaign effectiveness.
	Establish KPIs and performance dashboards.
	Ensure efficient allocation of marketing resources across subsidiaries.


Leadership &amp; Talent Development:


	Lead, mentor, and develop marketing teams across all companies.
	Foster collaboration between marketing, sales, product, finance, and operations.
	Recruit, coach, and retain high-performing marketing professionals.
	Promote a culture of innovation, accountability, and continuous improvement.


Stakeholder Management:


	Build strong relationships with media, agencies, vendors, and strategic partners.
	Represent the Group at industry events, conferences, and networking forums.
	Support investor relations and corporate reputation initiatives where applicable.


Key Performance Indicators (KPIs)


	Revenue growth attributable to marketing initiatives
	Brand awareness and market share growth
	Customer acquisition and retention rates
	Return on Marketing Investment (ROMI)
	Digital engagement and conversion metrics
	Lead generation performance
	Marketing campaign effectiveness
	Customer satisfaction and Net Promoter Score (NPS)
	Marketing budget adherence
	Growth in brand equity across subsidiaries


Required Competencies:
Commercial:


	Business acumen
	Revenue growth strategy
	Customer-centric mindset
	Market development
	Negotiation skills


Technical:


	Brand management
	Digital marketing
	Marketing analytics
	CRM systems
	Marketing automation
	Public relations
	Corporate communications
	Budget management.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should forward their CV to: prixairhumanresources@gmail.com using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",
